ValidationRule.description: Prevents an opportunity from advancing past Discovery until Metrics and Identified Pain score fields are populated. Threshold: both fields must have a value.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Solution Alignment"), OR( ISNULL(MEDDICC_Metrics_Score__c), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Metrics_Score__c, ""), ISNULL(MEDDICC_Identified_Pain_Score__c), ISPICKVAL(MEDDICC_Identified_Pain_Score__c, "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To advance to Solution Alignment, Metrics and Identified Pain scores must be entered. These fields help ensure we have confirmed the business case before proposing a solution.
